reviews.review_description: Looked like a fun game, but then after a few levels I enabled the passthrough MR mode and now I can't get it to start without prompting me to rescan my room over and over.  Can't even close the program now without restarting my headset - it prevents me from bringing up the main menu and I can only bring up the power menu via the button on the headset's side.   I uninstalled and reinstalled, I've enabled and disabled access to spatial data.  No change.  Too bad, because it really did look like a fun game.

reviews.review_title: Mixed reality is no longer broken
reviews.review_description: Since a new update the MR-Mode is no longer broken and works perfect. So 5 stars is deserved !

Enabling pass through crashes the
 game and the only way to play is to delete app data and not play in pass through 🥲

when I enable it, it gives me the pastrough setup and I can't enable it
PLS HELP ASAP
So much fun 😊 Well done Mark!

reviews.review_title: Needs to improve the button pressing

developer_response.body:
Hi, the new update includes an additional button activation mechanic. Let me know if the issue still persists when using it. You can also reach out to me directly at gravitylab@mark-schramm.com

//Edit 23rd May 2022
Hi, just wanted to check in and see if you had any luck with the new button mechanic. If not, you can join the Discord at https://gravitylab.quest/discord and I can help troubleshoot there directly.
Thanks! - Mark

reviews.review_description: This is a fun puzzle game, but I wish I could save progress better.  Also it freezes too often.  The screen will turn into small square with black surrounding making it unplayable.  I can go through a level or two, then "black walls" appear.  I can't even exit the game and have to power off or restart the oculus.

Great game. Puzzling in this game is so cool is so cool. But i lost all my progress!

Help

developer_response.body: Hi, Sorry to hear that! When online features are enabled in the game, the game should try to auto-sync progress from the leaderboard server at game start. Can you check in the game's settings that online features are enabled? You can also jump on the Discord where you can chat with me directly: https://gravitylab.quest/discord

Also make sure to remove the space after the com or IT WILL NOT WORK
You can use this link for 25% off 

                            -Review-

This game is really fun and it’s basically all about gravity and how to get shapes into different types of holes it’s really fun to progress because it can seem easy but it’s actually really hard
Interesting puzzles to solve. Nice casual game  with some problem solving

Since launch I’ve enjoyed the game and it’s unique puzzles, it’s really refreshing to see a game like this in the oculus store. I should also note that the dev continues the improve the game beyond what devs usually do, most oculus apps are released and then don’t see any growth but I’m impressed this this game. 

I would recommend this game to anyone with a Vr headset, because even if you don’t love puzzle games, it’s a really nice change of pace and a great buy. (:

developer_response.body: Hi, I just pushed an update that fixes the broken thumb and adds a new button activation mechanic :)

reviews.review_description:
See title.
Nothing more to say…

Great game and even better with the updates that Mark provides. 

One of the most interesting games about

Thanks for the great game!

The miniaturized option basically shrinks everything down so you could just sit down and play this almost as a large scale tabletop game, which is awesome! I was looking for just the game that has this nice chill play style, but actually has some content and things to do. Loving it

I have loved this game and recommended it to friends.  I am at a point in the "professional" level (III) where I am missing a major component or idea and can't move forward.  I've spent hours trying everything I can and nothing is working.  How do I activate a second sensor/control?  I've tried the other levels, but they all require the same thing.  HELP!!!  I've searched YouTube, but no one has done anything since the release 5+ months ago and Gravity Lab website has no support.  Frustrating.

Hi, you can join me and few other players on the official discord https://discord.gg/saAkmkc and ask for solutions.
I also added a few videos on http://gravitylab.quest with play throughs

//Edit 23rd May 2022
Hi, just wanted to check in and see if you had any luck solving the level. If not, you can join the Discord at https://gravitylab.quest/discord and ask other players (or me :) ) there directly
Thanks! - Mark

reviews.review_description: I got this game for my mom thinking she would like it and it looks really fun but she has to press buttons in the menu many many times before it finally registers that she pressed it. The menu and buttons play sounds and animate as if she pressed the button but nothing happens until she presses it over and over at least 6 to 10 times. Seriously considering a refund as it's pretty much unplayable for her

developer_response.body:
Hi, the new update includes an additional button activation mechanic that might work better

//Edit 23rd May 2022
Hi, just wanted to check in and see if you had any luck playing the game. The new updates introduced a new way to press buttons, so I hope that oen works better for you :). If it's still not working, you can join the Discord at https://gravitylab.quest/discord and I can help troubleshoot there directly.
Thanks! - Mark

reviews.review_description:
I love this game, so I'm sad.
I've played a lot of games similar to this.
However, all such games were games of placing devices on fixed spaces.
Gravity Lab gave me a whole new experience because I had complete freedom to deploy the device.

But there is one thing that makes me sad about Gravity Lab.
That is, the same input does not produce the same output.
When the ball that is fired with only one gun installed at the entrance where the ball comes out comes back to me, it comes back at two or three different angles.
You might think of it as realistic elements created by gravity, physics engines, and collision detection, but it's a game, especially a puzzle or programming game, so it gives me the stress I don't need.

I proceeded with this game by clearing all stages to Hard.
However, I had a similar experience in many stages and somehow managed to fix it, but in stage 3-3, I got annoyed.

I knew a workaround, but I had to repeat small angle corrections dozens of times to complete it.
(Also, every time I made a change, I had to wait quite a while to see the result)

When I shoot the ball into devices installed over distant cliffs that I can't reach, it's only a matter of luck whether they work perfectly and return the ball to me.

It is good that the physical calculation is made in case two balls collide and obstruct their path. (welcome)

But we don't want it to happen for a ball passing over the same device to spread out in different lines.
When deploying long and complex devices, these small line changes will eventually scatter into huge angular changes, which only adds to stress and meaningless waiting time.

This game is definitely worth more than the price, with a new experience, decent volume, and access to user-created maps.

However, in my personal opinion, since it is a programming 'game' (I don't know if this expression is correct) , it would be really, really, really, really good if you could come up with an answer a little cleaner and more freely.

developer_response.body:
Hey, Developer is reading it :) 

I totally agree with you there. Unfortunately Unity physics is very much non deterministic and as you have said, produces fairly random results. I am looking for general solutions to the problem, while still trying to maintain a "non faked" approach. As a general tip, I suggest to use acceleration tubes as often as possible, since the output direction is fixed no matter how a ball enters it. Also making a V shape with boards will funnel balls into a linear path. But again, 100% with you on the issue.

reviews.review_description:
This game is perfect. I enjoy every part of this game.
However, when I finish a level. It'll show the rank table.
But, it just displays the rank table for a few seconds, then disappears. And shows "Not finding any data", Friends Rank is the same. (I swear my friends downloaded this game and played it too)

I don't know how to fix it. I really want to see the rank table.
Please give me some solving tips. 

Thanks
I sometimes watch Pale blue Earth on the moon...while solving puzzle. I don't want to rush...My relaxing time in Gravity Lab. Thank you Developer.
